steps.title: Identify the underlined portion's role
steps.content: The underlined portion reports an observation: participants' eyes tracked dream objects the same way awake people track real objects. This matching observation is the evidence the team uses to support their conclusion about how dreams are perceived.

steps.title: Match the function to the correct choice
steps.content:
The underlined portion presents a comparable circumstance—how awake people track objects—that justifies the team's conclusion that dreams are perceived as more than pure imagination.

The others either misidentify it as showing implications or a study pivot, or reverse the evidence's direction.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
